Have your say ABOUT CHRIS I have always believed that there is much more that unites us than divides us and that, despite our sometimes polarised political discourse, I remain convinced that our country's best years are ahead of us. I've lived in North Worcestershire nearly all my life. I'm an active campaigner, having previously served as a councillor and a school governor. My first job was delivering the Redditch Advertiser; I spent the money I earned in the Kingfisher Centre and learned to drive around our many roundabouts. I even had the opportunity to play on a few occasions at the Valley for and against the Reds. Before I became your MP, I was the Chief Executive of an international Trade Association, helping to safeguard jobs and industry during the COVID-19 pandemic, working alongside Ministers from all political parties. I was fortunate to get a great start in life, and as a parent, I want every child to have the same opportunities Whether it's rebuilding our public services, including our beloved NHS, making it easier to start a business, growing the economy, making our streets safe, or making life affordable again, I know it won't be easy, and tough decisions must be made. ​ As your Member of Parliament, I am here for you, regardless of how you cast your vote. My door is always open, and I am ready to assist you in any way I can. We may not always see eye to eye, but please know that you can always reach out to me for help or advice. NEED HELP WITH A LOCAL ISSUE? My team and I are here to help in any way we can. Click the button below to raise an issue with us.
